steps.name: And User records the product price from product detail
And User adds the product to cart
And User taps "Beli" button to proceed to payment
And User records shipping fee and insurance fee
And User confirms checkout by tapping "Beli"
And User selects "Virtual Account" payment method
And User taps "Bayar sekarang" to confirm payment
Then User sees the order success page
And The total price equals product price plus shipping fee plus insurance fee
